title: Wearable plug suits
wikitext:
[]: Wearable plug suits?             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Wed Jul 19, 2006 6:44 am I heard about plug suits you can wear IRL. Where can you buy them if there is such thing?

[]:             Quote Post by badc0de » Wed Jul 19, 2006 7:13 am The only site I know atm where you could buy (Rei & Asuka) plugsuits is this: http://www.cosmates.jp/shop/product_info/1795.html (Rei) http://www.cosmates.jp/shop/product_info/1793.html (Asuka) I don't know, if there's another place, where you could buy complete plugsuits, especially the boys-versions. :? Damn, I want a Kaworu-plutsuit, even if somebody has to paint it with liquid latex on my bare skin! XD

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Wed Jul 19, 2006 7:17 am I've seen a real life plugsuit before. The wearer had dyed her hair to blue so as to look like Rei. But I think you'd better not think of wearing it till you're as slim as the characters in the series, and as tall as them.

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Wed Jul 19, 2006 7:23 am As slim as them? I don't think that'd be very healthy.

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Wed Jul 19, 2006 7:28 am But if you wear the plug suit and you're not as slim as them you'll look like Asuka in the D type (was it D?) equipment... Kaji won't want to see it...

[]:             Quote Post by Eternal Yamcha » Wed Jul 19, 2006 7:34 am But if you wear the plug suit and you're not as slim as them you'll look like Asuka in the D type (was it D?) equipment... Kaji won't want to see it...

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Wed Jul 19, 2006 4:41 pm Unless you have about a thousand clams to throw away on crafting something that both fits at least somewhat flatteringly, looks cool, and doesn't feel like one of those Bally's Total Fitness plastic sweatsuits inside, you really have no need of a plugsuit. The world really has no need of you having a plugsuit. Why couldnt's the kids have just piloted in shorts and a T-shirt?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Jul 19, 2006 4:42 pm Hexon.Arq wrote: Why couldn's the kids have just piloted in shorts and a T-shirt?

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Thu Jul 20, 2006 3:44 pm Before you try putting on a plug suit remember that spandex is a privilege not a right.

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Fri Jul 21, 2006 1:10 am anyone knows about kaworu plugsuits? man I want one, my hair is completely similar right now, (well except for the silver color)

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Fri Jul 21, 2006 2:59 am For $1000, those suits look like garbage. Especially when there are fanboys making their Spider-Man costumes like this one for a lot less than that. It's made out of wetsuit material, and I have a feeling that a halfway decent plugsuit would be made out of the same stuff (with the plates and stuff sculpted out of plastic or latex). Neoprin (the wetsuit stuff) has a good ammount of stretch to it, which is why it's much more form fitting.

[]:             Quote Post by badc0de » Fri Jul 21, 2006 3:05 am Six Winged Angel wrote: anyone knows about kaworu plugsuits? man I want one, my hair is completely similar right now, (well except for the silver color)

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Fri Jul 21, 2006 4:14 am that sounds....difficult, but if you succeed, won't hesitate giving it a try sometime and make Greece's first handmade evangelion costume! (i'm on the ideal weight too fortunately)

[]:             Quote Post by darth_mark » Fri Jul 21, 2006 10:53 am be careful what you wish for.. [URL=http://img250.imageshack.us/my.php?image=shinjisuitbn6.jpg] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Fri Jul 21, 2006 11:27 am ahahahaa he even have the drop lol

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Fri Jul 21, 2006 3:51 pm Well I made my own personal plugsuit, for my own evangelion

[]: Re: Wearable plug suits?             Quote Post by Lurking2018 » Wed Jul 18, 2018 12:35 pm The easiest way to cosplay one of the characters would be to wear a pair of tights and jacket here are some examples: https://artfiles.alphacoders.com/889/88907.jpg http://images1.wikia.nocookie.net/__cb20121118021215/evangelion/images/0/0c/3.0_Asuka.png I have heard that movie costume designers look at motor cross gear to get ideas for armor. One idea is to come up with a costume made up of protective equipment from such activities as football, archery and fencing then do the decoration and detail work. If you were the engineer at NERV and was assigned the task of designing a plugsuit what features would it have?
summary:
[]: Wearable plug suits?             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Wed Jul 19, 2006 6:44 am I heard about plug suits you can wear IRL. Where can you buy them if there is such thing?

[]:             Quote Post by badc0de » Wed Jul 19, 2006 7:13 am The only site I know atm where you could buy (Rei & Asuka) plugsuits is this: http://www.cosmates.jp/shop/product_info/1795.htm
